SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class AquiferDrive

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.AquiferDrive
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, ReservoirDrive
public class AquiferDrive extends Object implements ReservoirDrive
Gas-reservoir drive with steady-state aquifer water influx (Fetkovich-style support).

Pure volumetric depletion (MaterialBalanceGasDrive) overestimates pressure decline when an aquifer provides pressure support. This model adds a Fetkovich steady-state influx term: the water influx rate is proportional to the drawdown between the aquifer and the reservoir,

q_w = J_aq (p_aq - p_res)

and the cumulative influx partially replaces the produced gas voidage, slowing the p/z decline. The aquifer pressure itself is depleted by the cumulative influx relative to its capacity. The model remains a fast linearised surrogate suitable for integrated network coupling.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • MaterialBalanceGasDrive

  • Constructor Details

    • AquiferDrive

      public AquiferDrive(double initialPressureBara, double giipSm3, double averageZ, double aquiferProductivity, double aquiferCapacitySm3)
      Creates an aquifer-supported gas drive.
      Parameters:
      initialPressureBara - initial reservoir pressure in bara
      giipSm3 - initial gas in place in surface Sm3
      averageZ - average gas deviation factor (dimensionless, > 0)
      aquiferProductivity - aquifer influx index in Sm3/day of gas-equivalent voidage per bar
      aquiferCapacitySm3 - total gas-equivalent voidage the aquifer can supply, in Sm3

  • Method Details

    • getReservoirPressure

      public double getReservoirPressure()
      Returns the current average reservoir pressure.
      Specified by:
      getReservoirPressure in interface ReservoirDrive
      Returns:
      reservoir pressure in bara

    • produce

      public void produce(double producedVolumeSm3, double dtDays)
      Advances the drive by producing a volume over a time step.
      Specified by:
      produce in interface ReservoirDrive
      Parameters:
      producedVolumeSm3 - surface volume produced during the step in Sm3
      dtDays - length of the time step in days

    • getCumulativeProduction

      public double getCumulativeProduction()
      Returns the cumulative produced volume.
      Specified by:
      getCumulativeProduction in interface ReservoirDrive
      Returns:
      cumulative production in Sm3

    • getInPlaceVolume

      public double getInPlaceVolume()
      Returns the recoverable (or initial in-place) volume basis used by the drive.
      Specified by:
      getInPlaceVolume in interface ReservoirDrive
      Returns:
      reference volume in Sm3

    • getCumulativeInflux

      public double getCumulativeInflux()
      Returns the cumulative aquifer influx (gas-equivalent voidage).
      Returns:
